title: Borderless Windowed Vulkan
description: Pretty much cubes without boarders mod but working with vulkan mod - This also works without vulkan incase you just prefer this mod
body:
**Borderless Windowed Vulkan**
---
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-5865F2?logo=discord&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/A2Nx9kxDeB) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-1bd96a?logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://modrinth.com/user/cutebow)
--- Adds Borderless Windowed *More commonly known as cubes without borders** to work with vulkan (Also works without the vulkan mod) A question you might be asking: "Doesn't vulkan already have this built in?" - Yes. But not like this, without the mod if you click off the screen still minimizes, And it does not fix the issue I stated below in "Fixes" section. # If you want motionblur for VulkanMod check this mod out: [Vulkan Motion Blur](https://modrinth.com/mod/vulkan-motion-blur) **note: a windows update might break it for you so if it doesn't work that could be why.** ---
**Showcase** ![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HwGFylw6/images/85b1e23c7a1f8e1d4781a015b256745c407def17.png) _Heres Win + Tabbing working with other windows_
--- **Goal and what it does** This mod lets you run Minecraft in a borderless fullscreen window. You can keep the game open while using other apps on another monitor, or even interact with things on top of Minecraft, without the game minimizing itself. The goal of this project is to just work out of the box and feel good to use. I spent a lot of time fixing issues, like not being able to tab out or the game breaking if you clicked F11 really fast. I tested this a lot to make sure it behaves properly in real use. It works both with Vulkan and without it, but it was mainly made with Vulkan in mind. Even without Vulkan it should still work completely fine. **OS?** I do not have access to Linux or macOS devices, so I cannot test those platforms myself. If you try the mod on Linux or macOS, let me know how it goes in my Discord. Whether it works, breaks, or has issues, any feedback helps. **Fixes** This mod also fixes a really annoying Discord screenshare issue where the stream would be super choppy and update at something like one frame every few seconds. I spent a long time trying to figure out what caused that problem, and this change ended up being required to fix it. **Requires** - https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl - https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu **Recommends** - https://modrinth.com/mod/vulkanmod have any questions? need help? want to report a bug? Request a something added to the mod? or you just wanna be cool? ⭐ **Then join my Discord!** [![Follow me!](https://img.shields.io/badge/Follow%20me!-💕-pink?style=flat)](https://namemc.com/profile/cutebow) [![NameMC](https://img.shields.io/badge/namemc-cutebow-ffb6c1?style=flat&logo=minecraft&logoColor=white)](https://namemc.com/profile/cutebow)
